# Development
setwd("C:/Users/q1027508/Documents/myPrograms/DSR/DataSpecsReviewer")
devtools::load_all()

# Test
data_review()

# Generate documentation
devtools::document()

# Install package locally
devtools::install(
  upgrade = "never",
  dependencies = FALSE
)

# Optional package check
devtools::check()

# Fresh-session test: Restart R:
library(DataSpecsReviewer)
options(shiny.fullstacktrace = TRUE)
data_review()

# Build distributable package
# devtools::build_vignettes() # depreciated
pkgbuild::build(vignettes = TRUE)
devtools::build()

# Optionally test in a clean session:
install.packages(
  "DataSpecsReviewer_1.0.0.tar.gz",
  repos = NULL,
  type = "source"
)

library(DataSpecsReviewer)
data_review()


# Before release
# git add .
# git commit -m "Release v1.0.0"
# git tag v1.0.0

# Search the keyword, "setNames":
grep(
  "setNames",
  unlist(
    lapply(
      list.files("R", full.names = TRUE),
      readLines
    )
  ),
  value = TRUE
)

#------------------
# search the file itself for the keyword, "read_one_file"
rfiles <- list.files("R", full.names = TRUE)

for (f in rfiles) {
  txt <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)

  if (any(grepl("read_one_file", txt, fixed = TRUE))) {
    cat("FOUND IN:", f, "\n")
  }
}


# ======================================================================

cd "C:/Prasanth/myPrograms/R Programs/2026/DSR/DataSpecsReviewer"
git init
git remote add origin https://github.com/vpprasanth/DataSpecsReviewer.git
git add .
git commit -m "Initial release v1.0.0"
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main
